perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink knit sweater and a camouflage patterned bucket hat, stands in a Costco store holding a large plastic container of seafood soup. (2) She points at the contents through the clear lid, then is joined by another woman wearing a black dress. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen/dining setting where the main character, now wearing a white sweater and a navy beret, presents the same seafood soup kit along with a separate large plastic bag of broth. (4) She uses pink chopsticks to separate and count individual shrimps on a plate and crab meat pieces in the container. (5) A metal pot on a stove is shown with the seafood soup simmering and being stirred with a black ladle, showing steam and various vegetables. (6) Both women sit at a table, eating the soup from the pot and gesturing towards the camera with enthusiastic facial expressions and hand signs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, cheerful, and fast-paced background music begins immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice narrates her discovery at Costco. (2) The music remains constant as she discusses the price and shows the product to a friend; ambient store noise is minimal. (3) The audio quality transitions to a clearer indoor environment where two female voices discuss the ingredients and the cooking process with an excited tone. (4) Occasional 'ding' sound effects are used to highlight specific features or text appearing on screen. (5) The video ends with both women speaking in unison and laughing over the upbeat music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; 'Super Sincere Shrimp & Crab Meat Seafood Soup' in bright red and yellow variety-show style font. (2) Functional: 'This is new', '1kg 389 NTD', 'I bought it for 499 NTD'. (3) Functional: '21 Shrimp', '11 Crab meat' with 'Boing' effect text when highlighting the crab meat. (4) Decorative: 'Delicious, delicious', 'Seafood soup 1-10 points we give...', '9 Points' in large gold/red font. (5) Functional: '500 NTD for 2-4 people', '2 people will be super full'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a Shopping Discovery -> Product Unboxing -> Cooking Demo -> Tasting and Final Rating flow.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in pink/white, 1 female friend in black dress.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, initially in a pink sweater and camo hat, later changing into a white top and navy beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half shows the refrigerated section and aisles of a Costco warehouse. The second half shows a modern, well-lit home interior with a dining table and kitchen elements.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even indoor lighting throughout both locations.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence (Ingredient Count) -> Performance (Cooking) -> Result (Rating).
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle consumer recommendation and food review. It aims to persuade viewers of the high value-for-money of a specific Costco product by physically counting the premium ingredients (shrimp and crab) and demonstrating the ease of preparation and satisfactory taste through a positive reaction and numeric rating.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a single brand's product, showcasing the logo and providing price details while giving a highly positive score.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of colorful, large-scale variety show captions and 'point counting' logic for food quality.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy delivery style common in social media short-form product reviews, focusing on quantifiable value (e.g., number of shrimps) to build trust.
